fields.if_the_resp_was_under_obligation_as: Terminal Railroad Association of St Louis
The United Government of Wyandotte County/Kansas City, KS
Other debt and lease guarantees related to various
Note 1. Terminal Railroad Association of St. Louis Mortgage Bonds are fully funded by TRRA through a Sirving Fund established with a balance in the
amount of approximately $18 million as of December 31, 2009. This fund covers future interest and principal payments through the remainder of the bonds
Note 2 At 12/31/09, using the percentage of completion method, $9 million of the $12 million was included in schedule S10 as a capital lease
Note 3 At 12/31/09, using the percentage of completion method, $29 million of the $37 million was included in schedule S10 as a capital lease
Note 4. Santa Fe Pacific Pipelines, Inc (SFPP), an indirect, wholly-owned subsidiary of BNSF Railway, has a guarantee in connection with its remaining special
limited partnership interest in SFPP, L.P. All obligations with respect to the guarantee will cease upon termination of ownership rights which would occur upon
a reference issued by BNSF Railway on the exercise of the companies by the general partners of SFPP, L.P.
Note 5. Residual value guarantees related to local motives, vehicles and miscellaneous other equipment. Maximum future payments are estimated to be
$270 million. The company has recorded a $68 million asset and corresponding liability for the fair value of the RVGs as of 12/31/09.
